title: The GOAT tower: Why Illinois farmers built this 31-foot tower just for goats
summary_full: A unique 31-foot brick tower in Windsor, Illinois, built for goats, has gained online attention.  Farmers David and Marcia Johnson created the 'Tower of Baa-Goat' to allow their animals to express natural climbing instincts.  This structure, originally conceived in the late 1990s, serves as a practical enrichment for the goats and a distinctive farm attraction.
